title: pgstat — Capacity & Trends
description: Uzun zaman araliginda kapasite planlamasi: connection trend, WAL daily growth, query volume, slow query trend.

list.name: instance
list.query: select display_name as __text, instance_pk as __value from control.instance_inventory where is_active order by display_name
list.label: Instance

panels.title: Bağlantı Trendi (P95) — son 30 gün
panels.description: Her instance için P95 bağlantı sayısı, günlük bucket. Trend yukarı doğruysa kapasite artırımı düşün.

targets.rawSql: select $__timeGroupAlias(d.sample_ts, '1d'), i.display_name as metric, percentile_cont(0.95) within group (order by d.numbackends) as value from fact.pg_database_delta d join control.instance_inventory i on i.instance_pk = d.instance_pk where $__timeFilter(d.sample_ts) and (i.instance_pk in ($instance) or 'All' in ($instance)) group by 1, i.display_name order by 1

select $__timeGroupAlias(w.sample_ts, '1d'), i.display_name as metric, sum(w.period_wal_size_byte) as value from fact.pg_wal_snapshot w join control.instance_inventory i on i.instance_pk = w.instance_pk where $__timeFilter(w.sample_ts) and (i.instance_pk in ($instance) or 'All' in ($instance)) group by 1, i.display_name order by 1

panels.title: Günlük Sorgu Hacmi (calls)
panels.description: agg.pgss_daily kullanır — uzun zaman aralığı için optimize.

targets.rawSql: select bucket_date as time, i.display_name as metric, sum(a.calls_total) as value from agg.pgss_daily a join control.instance_inventory i on i.instance_pk = a.instance_pk where bucket_date >= now() - interval '30 days' and bucket_date <= now() and (i.instance_pk in ($instance) or 'All' in ($instance)) group by 1, i.display_name order by 1

select bucket_date as time, i.display_name as metric, sum(a.total_exec_time_ms_total) as value from agg.pgss_daily a join control.instance_inventory i on i.instance_pk = a.instance_pk where bucket_date >= now() - interval '30 days' and bucket_date <= now() and (i.instance_pk in ($instance) or 'All' in ($instance)) group by 1, i.display_name order by 1

panels.title: Database Boyut Buyumesi (live tup, son 30 gün)
panels.description: Tablo bazlı live tuple toplamı — günlük bucket. Hızla büyüyen DB'leri belirler.

targets.rawSql: with daily as (select date_trunc('day', t.sample_ts) as day, dbr.datname, sum(t.n_live_tup_estimate) as live from fact.pg_table_stat_delta t left join dim.database_ref dbr on dbr.instance_pk = t.instance_pk and dbr.dbid = t.dbid where t.instance_pk in ($instance) and $__timeFilter(t.sample_ts) group by 1, dbr.datname) select day as time, datname as metric, max(live) as value from daily group by 1, datname order by 1

panels.title: 30 Gün Lineer Tahmin (connection)
panels.description: Son 30 günden lineer regresyon ile 30 gün sonraki P95 tahmini.

targets.rawSql: with daily_p95 as (select i.display_name, date_trunc('day', d.sample_ts)::date as day, percentile_cont(0.95) within group (order by d.numbackends) as p95 from fact.pg_database_delta d join control.instance_inventory i on i.instance_pk = d.instance_pk where d.sample_ts > now() - interval '30 days' and (d.instance_pk in ($instance) or 'All' in ($instance)) group by i.display_name, day) select display_name as metric, regr_intercept(p95, extract(epoch from day)) + regr_slope(p95, extract(epoch from day)) * extract(epoch from now() + interval '30 days') as value from daily_p95 group by display_name
